headline: This Plexus Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 4 Upgrades For Monday
summary: Wall Street analysts upgraded and raised price targets for WMB, PLXS, AEP, and TRP. Check out analyst ratings page for other stocks.

headline: Goldman Sachs Upgrades Williams Companies to Buy, Announces $82 Price Target
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst John Mackay   upgrades Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) from Neutral to Buy and announces $82 price target.
